2234630.name: The Lost Uncle
2234630.description:
The Lost Uncle is a single-player first-person adventure game with multiple open worlds in different times and places, in which you search for any evidence of what happened to Steve's uncle together with Dan, who talks to you through a handheld radio.

When Steve and Daniel were little, they often went to the cottage of Steve's uncle, who was a detective and solved various cases, including the latest one... but suddenly he disappeared. This left Steve and Dan with no other choice but to go on an adventure to find him and find out what happened to him.

In the game, you only start with this information and you learn the rest of the story while playing as Steve. However, Daniel will always be close to you thanks to your radio, so you won't miss out on various jokes or insults and you'll drive away boredom with him.



  • A first-person adventure game with lovely graphics and a mysterious story.
  • Each map is completely different, with its own color style, so you won't go through the same places multiple times.
  • Fully dubbed dialogues between Steve and Dan with a bit of humour.
  • Puzzles require the player to think, search and investigate to solve them.



This game was developed by a 16 year old person with a dream to create his own game that he and a couple of other people would like.
2234630.supported_languages:
英语*, 捷克语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
